Am Thu, 23 Nov 2003 20:25:31 +0200 schrieb Heimo Dochtermann:


Ja! Und hochgerechnet aufs Jahr macht das eine Performance von:

"One of the main weaknesses of mankind is the average man's familiarity
with the word 'impossible'. He knows all the rules which will not work.
He knows all the things which cannot be done."         -- Renato Oesterhelweg
